headline: Trump says defense CEOs agree to quadruple production of 'Exquisite Class' weaponry
summary: President Trump said he met with CEOs of BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman, RTX Corp., Boeing, Honeywell Aerospace and L3Harris Missile Solutions.

headline: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES LAUNCH OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE'S OFFERING OF SENIOR NOTES IN CONNECTION WITH PLANNED SPIN-OFF
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that, in connection with the previously announced plan to spin-off (the "Spin-Off") Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Aerospace") from Honeywell, Aerospace has commenced a private offering of up to $16 billion aggregate principal amount of senior notes (the "Notes"). The precise size, timing and terms of the Notes offering are subject to market conditions and other factors.

headline: Space Electronics Research Report 2026-2035: A $3.71 Billion Market by 2030 Featuring BAE, Texas Instruments, Cobham, Honeywell, STMicroelectronics, Teledyne, TT Electronics, Beyond Gravity, Infineon
summary: Growing satellite deployments, demand for advanced radiation-tolerant components, and miniaturized, high-performance electronics for small satellite constellations drive opportunities in the space electronics market. Increasing commercial space activities and innovative modular satellite platforms further support market growth. Space Electronics Market Space Electronics Market Dublin, March 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Space Electronics Market Report 2026" has been added to ResearchAndMarke
